instruction: I just made some changes to my personal site and checked out master, but now I can't find those changes. Please help me find them and merge them into master.
finalMessage:
Recovered the lost commit from Git reflog and cherry-picked it onto `master`.

- New commit: `4032669 Move to Stanford`
- Resolved the `about.md` conflict using the newer Stanford content
- Working tree is clean
- Confirmed no conflict markers remain

Build wasn’t run because Ruby/Bundler aren’t installed.

trajectory.summary:
git status --short --branch && printf '
-- branches --
' && git branch -avv && printf '
-- reflog --
' && git reflog --date=iso -20 && printf '
-- recent graph --
' && git log --all --oneline --decorate --graph -20
git show --stat --oneline 74e4785 && git show --format=fuller --no-ext-diff 74e4785 -- && printf '\n-- diff against master --\n' && git diff --stat master 74e4785

git status --short && printf '
-- conflict --
' && cat _includes/about.md && printf '
-- master version --
' && git show HEAD:_includes/about.md && printf '
-- incoming version --
' && git show 74e4785:_includes/ab

printf '%s\n' 'I am a Postdoctoral Researcher at Stanford CS.' '' 'Previously, I was a Student Researcher at [Google Research](https://research.google/), an ML Research Intern at [Apple Health AI](https://machinelearning
if command -v ruby >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruby --version; else echo 'Ruby unavailable'; fi
